entry_rules.title: Valid Match Ticket Required
entry_rules.description: Every visitor must present a valid match ticket before entering the stadium. Tickets must be issued through authorized channels.

common_questions: Can I enter without a ticket?
Can I buy tickets at the stadium?
ai_metadata.recommended_response: A valid match ticket is required for entry. Visitors should purchase tickets only through official channels.

entry_rules.title: Digital Ticket Verification
entry_rules.description: Visitors using digital tickets must display the QR code on their registered mobile device during security verification.
exceptions: Printed tickets issued by official organizers

common_questions: Can I use a screenshot of my ticket?
Can someone else use my QR code?
ai_metadata.recommended_response: Visitors should use the official ticket application or authorized ticket format for entry.

entry_rules.title: Identity Verification Required
entry_rules.description: Visitors may be required to present valid identification documents matching their ticket details.

common_questions: Can I enter with another person's ticket?
ai_metadata.recommended_response: Carry a valid identification document if your ticket category requires verification.

entry_rules.title: Early Arrival Recommendation
entry_rules.description: Visitors are encouraged to arrive early to complete security checks and avoid congestion during peak entry periods.

common_questions: When should I reach the stadium?
ai_metadata.recommended_response: Arrive at least 90 minutes before kickoff to allow time for security checks and navigation.

entry_rules.title: Designated Gate Entry
entry_rules.description: Visitors must enter through the gate assigned on their ticket to maintain crowd distribution and security control.
exceptions: Emergency rerouting authorized by stadium staff

common_questions: Can I enter through another gate?
ai_metadata.recommended_response: Use the gate mentioned on your ticket. Staff may redirect visitors during operational changes.

entry_rules.title: Single Entry Validation
entry_rules.description: Each ticket can only be scanned once. Duplicate attempts may result in entry denial.

common_questions: Can multiple people use one ticket?
Can I leave and come back?
ai_metadata.recommended_response: Tickets are valid for a single authorized entry unless re-entry is specifically allowed.

entry_rules.title: Security Screening Required
entry_rules.description: All visitors must pass security screening before entering the stadium premises.

ai_metadata.recommended_response: Security screening includes ticket validation, bag inspection, and prohibited item checks.

entry_rules.title: No Unauthorized Entry Areas
entry_rules.description: Visitors may only access zones and seating areas permitted by their ticket type.

common_questions: Can I visit another seating area?
ai_metadata.recommended_response: Access is limited to your assigned seating and permitted zones.

bag_rules.title: Small Bags Only Policy
bag_rules.description: Visitors are allowed to bring only small personal bags that comply with stadium size restrictions.

ai_metadata.recommended_response: Only small bags within the approved size limit are allowed after security inspection.

bag_rules.title: Large Bag Restriction
bag_rules.description: Large backpacks, suitcases, travel bags, and oversized luggage are not permitted inside the stadium.

ai_metadata.recommended_response: Large bags and luggage are not allowed inside the stadium. Use designated storage facilities if available.

bag_rules.title: Transparent Bag Recommendation
bag_rules.description: Transparent bags are recommended to speed up security screening and reduce entry waiting time.

common_questions: Do I need a clear bag?
Will a transparent bag make entry faster?
ai_metadata.recommended_response: Clear bags are recommended because they allow faster security inspection.

bag_rules.title: Medical Bag Exception
bag_rules.description: Visitors carrying medically necessary equipment or supplies may bring approved medical bags after security verification.

ai_metadata.recommended_response: Medical equipment and medication are allowed after appropriate security verification.

bag_rules.title: Baby Care Bag Exception
bag_rules.description: Parents or guardians may bring essential baby care items after security inspection.
exceptions: Special childcare requirements approved by staff

ai_metadata.recommended_response: Essential baby care items are allowed after security inspection.

prohibited_items.title: Weapons and Dangerous Objects
prohibited_items.description: Weapons, sharp objects, and items capable of causing injury are strictly prohibited inside the stadium.

ai_metadata.recommended_response: Weapons and dangerous objects are not permitted inside the stadium.

prohibited_items.title: Explosive and Flammable Materials
prohibited_items.description: Explosive substances, fireworks, and flammable materials are prohibited due to safety risks.

ai_metadata.recommended_response: Explosive and flammable materials are prohibited inside the stadium.

prohibited_items.title: Illegal Substances
prohibited_items.description: Illegal drugs and unauthorized controlled substances are prohibited within stadium premises.
exceptions: Prescribed medication with valid medical purpose

ai_metadata.recommended_response: Only medically approved medication is allowed. Illegal substances are prohibited.

prohibited_items.title: Drones and Unauthorized Flying Devices
prohibited_items.description: Drones, remote-controlled aircraft, and unauthorized flying devices are not allowed inside stadium premises.

ai_metadata.recommended_response: Only officially authorized aerial equipment is permitted.

prohibited_items.title: Laser Devices
prohibited_items.description: Laser pointers and devices that may interfere with players, officials, or spectators are prohibited.

common_questions: Can I bring a laser pointer?
ai_metadata.recommended_response: Laser devices are not allowed inside the stadium.

prohibited_items.title: Large Flags and Banners
prohibited_items.description: Large flags, banners, and displays that obstruct views or create safety concerns are restricted.

ai_metadata.recommended_response: Small approved flags may be allowed. Large banners require prior approval.

prohibited_items.title: Glass Containers
prohibited_items.description: Glass bottles and containers are prohibited due to breakage and safety risks.

common_questions: Can I bring a glass bottle?
ai_metadata.recommended_response: Glass containers are not allowed inside the stadium.

prohibited_items.title: Professional Recording Equipment
prohibited_items.description: Professional cameras and recording equipment require prior authorization.

ai_metadata.recommended_response: Personal cameras may be allowed, but professional equipment requires authorization.

prohibited_items.title: Outside Food and Beverages
prohibited_items.description: Outside food and beverages are generally not allowed unless approved for medical or special requirements.

ai_metadata.recommended_response: Outside food and beverages are restricted. Exceptions may apply for medical or childcare needs.

prohibited_items.title: Noise and Disruption Devices
prohibited_items.description: Devices intended to create excessive noise or disturb visitors are prohibited.

common_questions: Can I bring an air horn?
ai_metadata.recommended_response: Devices that create excessive noise or disruption are not allowed.

fan_conduct_rules.title: Respectful Behaviour Required
fan_conduct_rules.description: All visitors must behave respectfully toward players, officials, staff, and other spectators.

common_questions: What happens if someone causes problems?
ai_metadata.recommended_response: Visitors must maintain respectful behaviour throughout the event.

fan_conduct_rules.title: No Discrimination or Hate Speech
fan_conduct_rules.description: Discriminatory behaviour, hate speech, or offensive actions based on identity or background are strictly prohibited.

ai_metadata.recommended_response: Discrimination and hate speech are not tolerated. Report incidents to stadium staff.

fan_conduct_rules.title: No Fighting or Physical Violence
fan_conduct_rules.description: Physical fights, aggressive behaviour, and attempts to harm others are strictly prohibited.

common_questions: What should I do if a fight starts?
How do I report an incident?
ai_metadata.recommended_response: Move away from unsafe situations and immediately notify nearby stadium staff.

fan_conduct_rules.title: No Pitch Invasion
fan_conduct_rules.description: Visitors must remain within designated spectator areas and are not allowed to enter the playing field.

common_questions: Can fans enter the field after the match?
ai_metadata.recommended_response: Only authorized personnel may enter the playing area.

fan_conduct_rules.title: Follow Staff Instructions
fan_conduct_rules.description: Visitors must follow instructions provided by stadium staff, security personnel, and emergency teams.

common_questions: Who should I ask for help?
ai_metadata.recommended_response: Follow official instructions from trained stadium personnel.

fan_conduct_rules.title: No Harassment or Intimidation
fan_conduct_rules.description: Harassment, intimidation, stalking, or unwanted behaviour toward other visitors is prohibited.

ai_metadata.recommended_response: Report harassment immediately to stadium staff or security personnel.

fan_conduct_rules.title: Maintain Clean Stadium Environment
fan_conduct_rules.description: Visitors must dispose of waste properly and avoid damaging stadium property.

common_questions: Can I leave items at my seat?
ai_metadata.recommended_response: Use designated waste disposal areas and help maintain a clean stadium.

fan_conduct_rules.title: Responsible Alcohol Behaviour
fan_conduct_rules.description: Visitors must follow alcohol consumption rules and must not create disturbances while under the influence.

common_questions: Can I drink inside the stadium?
What happens if someone is disruptive?
ai_metadata.recommended_response: Alcohol policies must be followed. Disruptive behaviour may result in removal.

accessibility_rules.title: Accessible Entrances Must Be Used For Accessible Routing
accessibility_rules.description: Visitors requiring accessibility support should use designated accessible entrances equipped with ramps, elevators, and assistance services.
exceptions: Visitors may use regular entrances if accessibility assistance is not required

common_questions: Which gate should wheelchair users use?
ai_metadata.recommended_response: Use designated accessible entrances for step-free access and dedicated assistance.

accessibility_rules.title: Accessible Seating Reserved For Eligible Visitors
accessibility_rules.description: Accessible seating areas are reserved for visitors with accessibility requirements and their approved companions.

common_questions: Can my companion sit with me?
ai_metadata.recommended_response: Accessible seating is reserved for eligible visitors and approved companions.

accessibility_rules.title: Wheelchair Assistance Available
accessibility_rules.description: Visitors requiring wheelchair support may request assistance from designated wheelchair service points.

common_questions: Where can I borrow a wheelchair?
ai_metadata.recommended_response: Wheelchair assistance and rental services are available at designated wheelchair service points.

accessibility_rules.title: Service Animals Permitted
accessibility_rules.description: Certified service animals supporting visitors with disabilities are permitted inside approved stadium areas.

common_questions: Can I bring my guide dog?
ai_metadata.recommended_response: Certified service animals are permitted with appropriate identification and visitor responsibility.

accessibility_rules.title: Priority Assistance Available
accessibility_rules.description: Visitors requiring additional support can request priority assistance from accessibility staff.

common_questions: Where can I find accessibility staff?
ai_metadata.recommended_response: Accessibility staff are available throughout the stadium to provide priority support.

photography_rules.title: Personal Photography Allowed
photography_rules.description: Visitors may take personal photographs using small handheld cameras or mobile phones for personal use, provided they do not disturb other spectators.

common_questions: Can I bring my phone camera?
ai_metadata.recommended_response: Personal photography using phones and small cameras is allowed if it does not disturb others.

photography_rules.title: Professional Camera Restrictions
photography_rules.description: Professional photography equipment requires prior authorization from event organizers.

ai_metadata.recommended_response: Professional photography equipment requires prior approval or media accreditation.

photography_rules.title: No Unauthorized Live Streaming
photography_rules.description: Visitors must not broadcast or stream live match footage without official permission.

ai_metadata.recommended_response: Live streaming match footage requires official authorization.

photography_rules.title: Drone and Aerial Photography Restrictions
photography_rules.description: Aerial photography devices including drones are prohibited unless specifically authorized by stadium management.

ai_metadata.recommended_response: Drones and aerial recording devices require official authorization.

emergency_rules.title: Follow Emergency Instructions
emergency_rules.description: Visitors must immediately follow instructions provided by stadium staff, security personnel, and emergency response teams during an emergency.

common_questions: What should I do during an emergency?
Who should I follow during an incident?
ai_metadata.recommended_response: Remain calm and follow instructions from official stadium emergency personnel.

emergency_rules.title: Emergency Exit Access
emergency_rules.description: Emergency exits and evacuation routes must remain clear and accessible at all times.

common_questions: Where is the nearest emergency exit?
Can I wait near an exit?
ai_metadata.recommended_response: Emergency exits must remain clear. Use the nearest available exit during evacuation.

emergency_rules.title: Medical Emergency Reporting
emergency_rules.description: Visitors should immediately report medical emergencies to nearby staff or use emergency assistance channels.

common_questions: Someone needs medical help, what do I do?
Where is the nearest medical center?
ai_metadata.recommended_response: Contact nearby staff immediately or request medical assistance through the stadium support system.

emergency_rules.title: Crowd Safety During Emergencies
emergency_rules.description: Visitors must avoid rushing, pushing, or creating panic situations during emergency movement.

common_questions: What should I do if the crowd starts moving?
ai_metadata.recommended_response: Move calmly, avoid pushing, and follow official evacuation guidance.

emergency_rules.title: Lost Person Emergency Assistance
emergency_rules.description: Visitors can report missing children, vulnerable individuals, or separated groups to designated support locations.

common_questions: My child is missing, what should I do?
ai_metadata.recommended_response: Report missing persons immediately to stadium staff or the nearest information desk.
